{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323202058FEBA08D2061A6F843B9A"}"},"total":3405},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7388362920209646361","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这是看到最好的第二本同人文四合院小说了，截胡系统，都是一手女主，戾气没有那么重，本书最大的爽点就是“收集和养成”那些年代的电视剧里的女主，女配，作者文笔也好，希望多写一点，加油，写个三四百万字。[赞][赞][赞]","text_exts":[{"e":16,"s":13,"text":"四合院","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%9B%9B%E5%90%88%E9%99%A2&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317742684586F843B9A%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227388362920209646361%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227303369706805660683%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%9B%9B%E5%90%88%E9%99%A2%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1720239404,"group_id":"7303369706805660683","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"单机日更30000字，不会作诗也会吟","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5iddRBgJvLRve2OBXJ1Cew=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-0000/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776788850&x-signature=sYCOa%2F9ZxoTl7Yne0kWtutXwoT0%3D","user_id":"347054186181836","user_name":"荒凉的石头城"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"347054186181836","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7303369706805660683","book_info":{"abstract":"【多女主不喜勿进】【多影视各路主角光环对撞，四合院、正阳门、人是铁、光荣时代，奔腾年代、金婚、胡同、乔家的儿女……名义、平凡岁月、两个女人的战争】【截胡系统，利己、圣母绕路】【女主无原创乱入】【多影视偏群像】【轻戾气偏日常】【家长里短】【杀鬼子】
林辰母胎穿越到了战乱年代，从记事起就跟着一个赤脚郎中爷爷长大。
带着前世记忆的他直到有一天遇到一个熟人他才知道自己穿越到了多影视的平行世界。
娄家老爷子为了感谢爷爷救命之恩，给他们爷孙二人安排进了南锣鼓巷九十五号院。林辰也被娄振华安排进了轧钢厂医务室……
在林辰的呼唤中系统姗姗来迟，系统是觉醒了但是需要截胡一个女主才能激活使用。
林辰没有犹豫，这个时间段也没得选了。先激活系统再说……谁知道从此一发不可收拾。
系统都激活了还不享受人生，那还等什么？

，男主也很果断，希望作者再接再厉，快点多出点女主，给男主多开开挂，还有就是快快跟新，这本书使我看这类题材写的最好的一本书了！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1707699365,"group_id":"7303369706805660683","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"我的意志可以击穿顽石","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/lDKmZfRrx23OmLWJ5nGLt67S8BtHXBI1AhYICYPtcu","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"2506531546597981","user_name":"坚不可摧的苏颜"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2506531546597981","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7303369706805660683","book_info":{"abstract":"【多女主不喜勿进】【多影视各路主角光环对撞，四合院、正阳门、人是铁、光荣时代，奔腾年代、金婚、胡同、乔家的儿女……名义、平凡岁月、两个女人的战争】【截胡系统，利己、圣母绕路】【女主无原创乱入】【多影视偏群像】【轻戾气偏日常】【家长里短】【杀鬼子】
林辰母胎穿越到了战乱年代，从记事起就跟着一个赤脚郎中爷爷长大。
带着前世记忆的他直到有一天遇到一个熟人他才知道自己穿越到了多影视的平行世界。
娄家老爷子为了感谢爷爷救命之恩，给他们爷孙二人安排进了南锣鼓巷九十五号院。林辰也被娄振华安排进了轧钢厂医务室……

ration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":2326,"reply_count":4,"show_pv":84967},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1707706910,"author_reply_time":1707706981,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7370934792869266200","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好看，很久没有看完以后出现的失落感。
这本纯真实四合院：一手淮茹，养成京茹等等，众多年代剧融合也很顺遂不生硬，主角看似风流多情感觉更像救赎文，年代剧没几个结局好的女角色，感情戏也挺好，完事以后也没漏。非常合口味，只要经常提名别忽略了就很好。文风也很爽戾气很少，掌握一切，没有干挑衅主角的！
同类文虚假四合院：二手，二手养他的种，PUA软胁，主角多高位置都在被挑衅…鸡皮蒜毛扯不断…就很离谱.
还是希望给崔大可来一个剧情一血，这个人物真的太孬了，还不如许大茂有好感。","text_exts":[{"e":27,"s":24,"text":"四合院","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%9B%9B%E5%90%88%E9%99%A2&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317742684586F843B9A%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227370934792869266200%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227303369706805660683%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%9B%9B%E5%90%88%E9%99%A2%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"},{"e":45,"s":42,"text":"年代剧","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%B9%B4%E4%BB%A3%E5%89%A7&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317742684586F843B9A%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227370934792869266200%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227303369706805660683%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%B9%B4%E4%BB%A3%E5%89%A7%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"},{"e":70,"s":67,"text":"救赎文","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%95%91%E8%B5%8E%E6%96%87&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317742684586F843B9A%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227370934792869266200%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227303369706805660683%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%95%91%E8%B5%8E%E6%96%87%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1716181660,"group_id":"7303369706805660683","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"接盘就接盘还非说曹魏之风，孟德之志就很呕。
